name: Microsoft — explicit context phrase
subject: Your single-use code
body: Hi hasan.mangrio@gmail.com, We received your request for a single-use code to use with your Microsoft account. Your single-use code is: 847291 Only enter this code on an official website or app.

name: Squarespace — spaced 3+3 digit format
subject: Squarespace Verification Code
body: Squarespace Account Information Verification Code Please use the following verification code to log in to Squarespace: 308 044 If you need assistance, please visit the Squarespace Help Center.
notes: Squarespace formats codes as 'NNN NNN' with a space. Parser must join them.

name: RentCafe — code leads the sentence
subject: OTP for login
body: Dear Hasan, 364813 is your one-time password (OTP) for login. It is valid for 10 minutes. Please do not share OTP with others.

name: MyChart — standalone code, no surrounding context words
subject: MyChart Verification Code
body: Hello Hasan! When prompted, enter the code below to finish authenticating with MyChart. 570022 Your code will expire after 30 minutes.

name: SAW — hyphenated government MFA code
subject: SAW MFA Code
body:
Authentication code
Código de autorización multifactorial
6493-865395
notes: State/govt portals use a NNNN-NNNNNN hyphenated format.

name: Nusuk — 4-digit code in square brackets
subject: Nusuk-Verification Code
body: Hello, Your verification code is [8016]. Enter this code in the Nusuk app to activate your account.

name: Qatar Airways — OTP with extended context gap
subject: Your one-time pin
body: Qatar Airways Here's the OTP you requested Please use the below one-time pin (OTP) to view your trip. 159538 This OTP will be valid for 5 minutes.
notes: Context keyword 'pin' appears, but >30 chars before the number. Falls through to standalone 6-digit match.

name: Marriott — 'temporary code' phrase
subject: Your Temporary Code Request
body: You recently requested a temporary code in order to complete an Account transaction. To authorize and proceed with your transaction, please enter the following code on your screen: 691675.

name: EA — code in subject line
subject: Your EA Security Code is: 936899
body: Your EA Security Code: 936899 If you didn't request this code, please go to your My Account page and change your password immediately.

name: Workday candidate — account activation link
subject: Verify your candidate account
body: Click this link to confirm your email address and complete setup for your candidate account https://globalhr.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/REC_RTX_Ext_Gateway/activate/abc123

name: Generic — magic login link
subject: Your magic login link
body: Hi Hasan, Here is your magic login link. Click it to sign in instantly. https://example.com/magic-login?token=mgl_9f8d7e6c5b4a3210fedcba This link expires in 15 minutes.

name: Lemonade — 'password' as code label (unusual phrasing)
subject: Your password
body: Hi Hasan, Here's your one-time password. Use it to log in: 286900 If it wasn't you trying to log in, just ignore this email.
